summary: Completed frontend-only regression for landing, signup/onboarding, and merchant/affiliate dashboards under missing Clerk/Stripe/API config. All requested graceful fallback states rendered correctly.
action_items: Optional UX copy improvement: replace raw technical onboarding error text ('API_BASE_URL is not configured...') with friendlier configuration guidance.
Optional maintainability: split /app/frontend/styles.css (>700 lines) into smaller style modules.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth testing guideline file path /app/auth_testing.md is missing in workspace (only relevant if Emergent Google auth testing is required later).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated with Playwright at http://localhost:3000 for routes: /, /signup?role=merchant, /signup?role=affiliate, /onboarding?role=merchant, /dashboard, /affiliate. Confirmed config-needed states, onboarding error handling, role URL preview, data-testid presence on critical controls, and no horizontal overflow on desktop/mobile.
rca of the issue: No blocking functional issue reproduced in requested scope. Onboarding connect error is expected in this environment because API_BASE_URL is intentionally missing; frontend handled this with visible inline error.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md: no credentials required for this static frontend test scope.
